---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change. Non-trivial features start life as a spec (`just spec <name>`).
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What user-visible problem does this solve? Why is it worth doing now?

## Proposed solution

A sketch of the approach. Which layer(s) does it touch
(domain / app / infra / server) and does it respect the layering invariants?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why they were set aside.

## API / contract impact

Any public API, proto, or OpenAPI changes and their stability implications.

## Additional context

Links to prior art, related issues, or a draft spec.
